build_stages.purpose: PyInstaller compilation of all Python source + native .so/.dll into single binary
Minimal Debian image containing only the compiled binary + system runtime libs + JSON config
build_stages.source_artifacts: NONE — only compiled binary is copied. No .py, .dll, .so, .c, .h files are present in the runtime layer.

exposed_ports.purpose: ZeroMQ PUB gateway — Unity client telemetry stream
ZeroMQ ROUTER — arbitration server for multi-user evaluation

environment_variables.name: BCI_BIND_HOST
environment_variables.purpose: Gateway bind address (0.0.0.0 for Docker ingress)

security_controls: No source code files present in runtime image
No plaintext keys in image layers or config files
Single compiled binary as entrypoint — no shell access required
HWM=1000 on all ZMQ proxy sockets to bound memory growth
AES-256-GCM AEAD encryption on all wire traffic
